mapper.select: SELECT cpc.*, hpao.pattern_type as patternType, hpao.option_name as optionName FROM hot_stamping_patternx_area_compatibility cpc LEFT JOIN hot_stamping_patternx_area_options hpao ON cpc.hot_stamping_patternx_area_id = hpao.id ORDER BY hpao.option_name, cpc.product_name

SELECT cpc.*, hpao.pattern_type as patternType, hpao.option_name as optionName FROM hot_stamping_patternx_area_compatibility cpc LEFT JOIN hot_stamping_patternx_area_options hpao ON cpc.hot_stamping_patternx_area_id = hpao.id WHERE cpc.hot_stamping_patternx_area_id = #{patternAreaId} ORDER BY cpc.product_name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hot_stamping_patternx_area_compatibility ( product_name, hot_stamping_patternx_area_id, compatibility_status, paper_type, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{productName}, #{hotStampingPatternxAreaId}, #{compatibilityStatus}, #{paperType}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE hot_stamping_patternx_area_compatibility SET product_name = #{productName}, hot_stamping_patternx_area_id = #{hotStampingPatternxAreaId}, compatibility_status = #{compatibilityStatus}, paper_type = #{paperType}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT product_name FROM hot_stamping_patternx_area_compatibility ORDER BY product_name

SELECT DISTINCT unnest(notice_ids) FROM hot_stamping_patternx_area_compatibility WHERE notice_ids IS NOT NULL AND array_length(notice_ids, 1) > 0 AND compatibility IN ('V', '▷')
AND pattern_area_option_id = #{patternAreaOptionId}
